data.title: Chewy Stock Slides As Investors Digest $500M Offering From Largest Shareholder
data.description: Chewy shares are moving lower in Wednesday's after-hours session after the company announced a public offering by a selling stockholder and a concurrent share repurchase.

data.title: Tesla Is Analyst's Top 2025 Stock Pick: Elon Musk Political Involvement May 'Accelerate' EV Maker Beyond Autos
data.description: Tesla stock could get a boost from CEO Elon Musk having a close working relationship with Donald Trump, according to one analyst.
